response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Cluster-wide critical reserve state with 22-min depletion window mandates inbound-only mode; outbound sharing suspended until SoC >0.60 and grid reconnection confirmed.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.34 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide synchronized battery failure; all peers in critical reserve below 15% SoC. Inbound-only mode mandatory. Awaiting dr_aggregator emergency supply or coordinated load-shedding. Do not resume outbound sharing until SoC > 0.60 and grid reconnection confirmed. Current depletion window ~22 min..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
